# erroneouslySubmitted

**Type**

A Boolean value that indicates whether a line item was submitted in error.

## Declaration

```swift
boolean erroneouslySubmitted
```

## Discussion

Only use this field when submitting corrections to a report. Set this field to `true` to indicate that you previously submitted the line item erroneously. This effectively undoes the line item submission. When submitting a correction, set the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/restatement] field to `true`.

For more information on correcting previously submitted line items, see [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/reportcorrections].

## Submitting corrections

- **restatement**: A Boolean value that indicates a line item contains a correction.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates a line item contains a correction.
